subject: Didn't love this month's book
body: Hi, I picked Bright Hollow this month and I just couldn't get into it - the pacing was so slow I gave up around chapter 6. I read the description on the site and it sounded like exactly my kind of thing but it really wasn't. Is the reader's guarantee something I can use here? I've been a member for almost two years and this is the first one that hasn't worked for me. Thanks!

subject: Reader's Guarantee request
body: Hi there, requesting the reader's guarantee for The Lantern Room please. I know I've used it a couple times recently but honestly I think I might be in a reading slump because none of these have been clicking for me. Thanks.

subject: Another book that didn't work
body: Hey - I know I just used the guarantee earlier this month but I picked up A Year of Small Birds and a friend recommended The Memory Theatre after. The Memory Theatre was a real miss for me. Any way to do another request? I feel bad asking but I'm trying to be honest about what I'm enjoying.

subject: reader guarantee
body: hi i'd like to use the readers guarantee on my may book please. the description made it sound like a literary thriller but it was much more of a slow character study and not what i was expecting at all. thanks!

subject: Disappointed again
body: I want to use the reader's guarantee for The Astronomer's Wife. I know your records will show I've requested this a few times but the curation has just not been working for me this past year. I am giving honest feedback every time. I love BOTM in principle but the books keep missing for me. Can we figure something out?

subject: Quick question about guarantee
body: Hi! I just got my second box and I really didn't enjoy this month's pick. I saw something on Instagram about a reader's guarantee - is that a real thing and how do I use it? Sorry to ask, still new!

subject: Book arrived damaged
body: Hello, my May book arrived with the cover bent and several pages dog-eared like it had been read before. I'd like a replacement copy if possible. I haven't actually read it yet so it's not about the content. Thanks for your help.

subject: Reader's guarantee request
body: Hi, requesting the reader's guarantee for Bright Hollow. The writing style just didn't work for me. Let me know if you need anything else from me.

subject: Reader's guarantee
body: Hi - I'd like to use the reader's guarantee for this month's pick. I think the last time I did this was years ago. Thanks!

subject: Coupon request
body: Hi, requesting the reader's guarantee for The Glass Orchard - this month's pick. Not what I was hoping for. Thanks.

subject: Wrong book in box
body: Hi, the box I received this month has the wrong book in it - I selected The Lantern Room but received Salt and Honey. Can you send me what I actually ordered? Don't want to use the guarantee, just need the correct book. Thanks.

subject: Another request
body: Hi, I requested the guarantee earlier (April book) but I want to add this month too - The Cartographer's Daughter wasn't for me either. Hoping you can do both?

subject: Guarantee please
body: Reader's guarantee for Soft Country. Did not finish.

subject: Cancellation question
body: Hi, I've been an annual member for over a year and I'm thinking about not renewing. The last couple boxes haven't been great. Before I cancel - is there anything you can do? Maybe credit for a book that didn't work?

subject: This month's book
body: Hi! Wanted to use my guarantee for this month - I picked Counting Backwards from Ten and it was way more graphic than I expected. Thanks!

subject: Question about my account
body: Hi, just wondering when I can use the reader's guarantee again? I used it last month and I want to make sure I'm following the rules. Also can you tell me how many I've used total? Thanks!

subject: Another miss
body: Hey, following up on my earlier email - I think the issue might be that I'm getting recommended too much literary fiction. Can I use the guarantee for The Inheritance of Wings too? I really am being honest, the curation just hasn't matched my taste.

subject: Reader's guarantee
body: I'm requesting the reader's guarantee on my May box. The book was Other People's Weddings. I know I've used the guarantee before but I don't think there should be a limit on getting a book I actually want to read. I'm paying for the membership.

subject: Re-activating?
body: Hi, I cancelled my membership earlier this year and I'm thinking about coming back. Before I do, just wondering - when I do reactivate, does my reader's guarantee history reset, or does it carry over from before? Trying to plan. Thanks.

subject: Wrong charge
body: Hi, I see a charge on my card from BOTM but I thought I had paused my membership last month. Can you check what happened? I don't want to use the guarantee or anything, I just want to make sure I'm not being double-billed.
